what_it_does: This file is a ledger/metadata record for a PNG image asset named 'image (12)' stored under the design-assets channel at path icons/image (12). It records the blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, versioning, provenance, and links.
observations: YAML-frontmatter ledger entry for an image asset
Recorded width and height are both 0
Version is 1 with a single version entry
created and updated timestamps are identical
standouts: Width and height are 0 for an image/png record
Asset has a generic, non-descriptive name
No outgoing links or usage references
conventions: Follows the channel-memory ledger schema with YAML frontmatter
Uses blob:// URI for content addressing
Includes versioned asset metadata with author session and timestamps
Separates channel, path, and address fields
concerns: Zero dimensions suggest the image size was not extracted or the asset metadata is incomplete
Generic filename reduces discoverability and semantic clarity
Empty alt text limits accessibility and searchability
No links leave usage context undefined
notes: A bare asset ledger stub for an icon PNG that lacks size, descriptive name, alt text, and usage links.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What does this icon visually represent?
Where in the product or design system is this icon intended to be used?
Why is the alt text empty?
purpose_vs_actual: The file serves its stated purpose as an asset ledger entry, but the actual metadata is incomplete (zero dimensions, empty alt, generic name).
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register an uploaded icon image into the design-assets channel so it can be referenced, versioned, and retrieved by other parts of the system.
contribution: Provides a versioned, addressable metadata record for a PNG icon asset, including its blob reference, channel/path identity, source, and author provenance, which a fused system could use to locate and version the underlying image.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger entry for a PNG icon named 'image (12)' in the design-assets/icons path, with zero recorded dimensions, empty alt text, and a blob reference.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an uploaded icon image asset for retrieval and versioning within the design-assets channel.
